key_points: 1540 Place apartments have known mold issues; bring dehumidifiers
Corlew Hall described as hotel-like; nearly impossible to meet people
State law forces trans students into mismatched dorm assignments
key_quotes: ive seen some people talk about the mold, ive already gotten some dehumidifiers and air purifiers
I lived in Corlew right now and it feels exactly like a hotel.... impossible to meet anybody!
Avoid 1540 place

key_points: MTSU is heavily a commuter school; campus empties on weekends
Multiple students independently describe feeling completely isolated and friendless
Clubs are the only reliable path to making friends here
key_quotes: There really isn't a party scene. Football isn't huge so it's harder to make friends without the big social events.
It's so annoying. It's the biggest reason our president needs to retire. He made on campus life dead.
Since you said a lot of people leave on the weekends, do weekends get a little bit boring for those who live on campus?

key_points: Raider Zone Grill praised for fresh-made burgers; beats pre-made options
Past student reported finding a cockroach in the cafeteria food
A Peck Hall food pod worker has a serious ongoing hygiene complaint
key_quotes: I was ordering a patty melt, and a roach scurries out across the counter
I refer to him as 'stinky' in my head. I absolutely hate when I get my morning coffee there and it just reeks
the burgers themselves i find much more appetizing fresh off the grill, not after they've been sitting for who knows how long

key_points: A trans student died by suicide in the library in late 2024
Numerous posts show students in acute depression, isolation, and financial crisis
Free counseling services exist but students often don't know about them
key_quotes: I hope I graduate before this campus becomes more of a bigotry cesspool. Starting to feel less and less welcome as a queer man
im homesick, have no friends here, have no family unless i drive an hour, i work two jobs and do school full time
I feel like utter trash right now. I'm 20 years old, yet I've never even had a friend

key_points: Tuition hiked 6.49% plus new $1,100 program fee, announced after July 1
HOPE/TELS scholarship timing creates a payment gap for summer classes
Athletic fee increases were omitted from Board materials; SGA bypassed
key_quotes: Why do they decide (or at least announce) these changes so late, especially when most of us have already made plans
Financial Aid told me my TELS won't be processed until after final grades are submitted, but the summer payment deadline is May 13
the materials given to the Board omitted the increase in athletic fees... the Chair called the vote to suspend debate

key_points: Tenured bad professors are nearly impossible to remove despite low ratings
Graduate teaching assistants teach core math classes with no prior student base
Strong programs in audio production, social work, aerospace, and recording industry
key_quotes: How is it possible that a professor that is this hated allowed to keep her job? You answered your own question: she's tenured.
That professor is a GTA, a graduate teaching assistant, so it isn't likely many other people have taken a class with her
I describe it as an in between of a university and community college

key_points: President McPhee served 25 years; accused of harassment, fired staff unequally
Admin fired an assistant dean for social media post while tolerating anti-trans rhetoric
Students expect conservative board to make a politically motivated replacement hire
key_quotes: He also sexually harassed employees. The punishment was a $10k reduction in salary which was reinstated not long after.
It felt like he cared more about corporate interests than actual students
Pretty sure the super conservative board is not going to replace him with a home run hire… probably a republican politician that will drive the university into an intellectual free fall

key_points: Parking is a genuine daily nightmare; tickets issued in ambiguous spots
Speeding in parking garages is dangerous and frequently complained about
Campus is flat and walkable but floods during rain; surrounded by mixed neighborhoods
key_quotes: Parking is terrible for everyone. For commuters. For residents. For staff.
Campus is kinda surrounded by ghettos tho
campus is extremely flat, and tends to flood during rain

key_points: Recording industry and audio production programs have strong national reputation
Pro flight program is relocating to Shelbyville; logistics remain uncertain for students
Little specific career outcome data shared; most posts focus on surviving, not thriving
key_quotes: MTSU with full scholarship (audio production) — he will be going to Tech!!
Flying will eventually be out of Shelbyville... I'm really glad I'm graduating before they finished the transfer
the statistics for biology are not great

key_points: Full-tuition scholarships available for strong transfer students via Buchanan Fellowship
International students hit hardest by late tuition hike announcements and program fees
WiFi infrastructure is poor despite reportedly fast wired speeds
key_quotes: MTSU increased tuition by about 6.49% and added a $1,100 program fee — and this was only announced after July 1
What sucks about MTSU is that the internet speed is actually super good if you're wired. 800-900 mbps. Their WiFi infrastructure stinks.
I pay all this tuition and I can't study past 6 pm in the library

key_points: Described repeatedly as a 'dead campus' with weak school spirit and thin community
LGBTQ+ students feel increasingly unwelcome given recent events and state laws
Pockets of warmth exist; random students check on crying peers and offer friendship
key_quotes: The campus is dead because of him. He needs to go.
Starting to feel less and less welcome as a queer man outside of the group in my major
if you are the beautiful girl who checked on me and asked if I was okay when I was crying on a bench... it meant more to me than I made it sound

key_points: **Campus Climate:** Anti-trans events tolerated; trans student died by suicide in library 2024
**Administration:** President faced sexual harassment allegations with minimal penalty; fired staff with double standards
**Safety:** Student Quarters apartments had documented shootings; off-campus areas described as sketchy at night
key_quotes: Especially disgusting that they would allow something like this considering the transgender woman who killed herself in the library just over a year ago
The president of the College Republicans is an open and self-admitted fascist who has verified connections to multiple neo-Nazi groups
as far as the shootings on Student Quarters go... not every complex has had shootings but there are 3 different complexes

key_points: MTSU chocolate milk is a beloved local product; sold at multiple off-campus spots
Davis Science Building has a private single-stall bathroom almost nobody knows about
Study abroad scholarships can cover nearly full cost if you apply strategically
key_quotes: I was able to get basically my whole program paid for with a combination of different scholarships, even the Pell Grant helped
The Davis Science Building has a 1-person stall with an adult changing table in it that hardly ever has anyone using it
JRs by the square! [for MTSU chocolate milk]
